name: Zivotofsky v. Kerry
question: Does a federal statute that directs the Secretary of State to record the birthplace of an American citizen born in Jerusalem as "Israel," if requested to do so, impermissibly infringe on the President's power to recognize foreign states?
description: A case in which the Court held that a federal statute directing the Secretary of State to record the birthplace of a citizen born in Jerusalem as “Israel” if requested to do so impermissibly infringed on the President’s power to recognize foreign states.
